issues.description: Narration says 'Two sections, ninety minutes each.' Per reference, Section I (Multiple Choice) is 105 minutes and Section II (Free Response) is 90 minutes. The two sections are NOT 90 minutes each. Total is 195 minutes (correctly stated as 'three hours fifteen minutes' in 04_exam_structure), which itself contradicts 90+90=180.
issues.fix: Change to 'Two sections, three hours fifteen minutes total, fifty-fifty weighted' or 'Section One is one hundred five minutes, Section Two is ninety minutes, fifty-fifty weighted.'

notes: All numbers in 04_exam_structure (45 MC / 105 min / 50%; Part A 30 Q / 60 min / no calc; Part B 15 Q / 45 min / calc; 6 FRQ / 90 min / 50%; Part A 2 Q / 30 min / calc; Part B 4 Q / 60 min / no calc; total 3h15m) match the reference exactly, and 15_recap/16_path are consistent; the sole error is the '90 minutes each' claim in 03_overview.
